title: jacquemontia fruticulosa
intro: Jacquemontia fruticulosa, also known as the Brazilian nightshade or beach morning glory, is a type of flowering vine in the morning glory family (Convolvulaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Jacquemontia fruticulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used to make a tincture or topical application to treat various skin conditions and wounds.
